name: Robin Tarrantula
comment: Building on the success of the LEDWash 1200 and Spiider‘s advanced technology, the all new Tarrantula is the most powerful LED beam/wash/effects fixture on the market. Now equipped with Robe's innovative lens coating technology which brings benefits such as  bright and clear lenses, no scratches or marks, higher light output and longer intervals between cleaning.

capabilities.comment: PWM output frequency of LEDs: Standard (300 Hz)
PWM output frequency of LEDs: High (600 Hz)
Save Pixel index and Mirror to fixture
Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast
Beam shaper indexing min to max

gwSpecs.description: Building on the success of the LEDWash 1200 and Spiider‘s advanced technology, the all new Tarrantula is the most powerful LED beam/wash/effects fixture on the market. Now equipped with Robe's innovative lens coating technology which brings benefits such as  bright and clear lenses, no scratches or marks, higher light output and longer intervals between cleaning.
